source_meta.source_document: Taperloc Complete Hip System and G7 Acetabular System

TRAYS.Tray Notes: The official Taperloc Complete and G7 product materials describe dedicated instrumentation and G7 tray-efficiency claims for the acetabular workflow.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe Taperloc Complete as the femoral stem family for the platform.
Official G7 product materials describe the G7 acetabular shell family and cup platform.
Official G7 product materials describe Vivacit-E and other G7 liner options.

row.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining the Taperloc Complete femoral stem family with the G7 acetabular system.
